target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Widespread collapse of structural elements; majority of visible facade and roof sections reduced to rubble; debris field covers base of structure; remaining standing portions show severe fragmentation and loss of integrity

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a single, heavily damaged structure with widespread collapse, exposed internal framing, and a debris field of rubble and brick fragments. The functional impact is complete loss of structural integrity and operational capability.
